evaluation.summary: The experiment failed immediately due to a SyntaxError caused by an invalid '!@#$ ' token at the start of the Python script, preventing any computation of Markovian transition probabilities.
next_directions: Correct the syntax error by removing the invalid '!@#$ ' marker from the generated Python code
Validate all generated code for Python syntax before execution
Rerun the experiment after fixing the script to compute the intended Markovian dependencies
